name: Robert Morley
abstract: Robert Adolph Wilton Morley (26 May 1908 – 3 June 1992) was an English actor who enjoyed a lengthy career in both Britain and the United States. He was frequently cast as a pompous English gentleman representing the Establishment, often in supporting roles.

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Hendricks
about_quotes.evidence: one of them was with Robert Morley, who is a favorite of mine
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Hendricks interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000 [interview 2 of 2]
